params.name: Water Lilies & Roses
params.description: This painting is a work by French Impressionist master Monet, one of the representative works of his mature style. It depicts the garden Monet personally created in Giverny, showcasing roses covered with arbors and blooming water lilies in the pond, with vibrant and lively colors. The contrast between the vivid roses and the soft colors of the water reflections demonstrates Monet's unique ability to capture light and color.
